sharedPost.text:
🎭 We’re so excited to share our upcoming production of The Good Doctor by Neil Simon, a witty and whimsical comedy inspired by the short stories of Anton Chekhov!

Directed by Meredith Sladek, this charming collection of stories is full of humor, heart, and unforgettable characters.

✨ Auditions are April 9, 10, and 11. Pay is a flat fee of $500.
🎟 Performances run June 19 to 21 and June 26 to 28, 2026, at Wagner College's Stage One

Interested in being part of the show? Check out this link for full audition details: https://sundogtheatre.org/opportunities/audition-notice-the-good-doctor/ 
We’d love to see you there!  [Graphic: Havoc Media]
~
#TheGoodDoctor #Auditions #CommunityTheatre #sundogtheatre
~
Susan Fenley Marjorie Hack Mark Giacalone Phyllis Guglietta Nicole Reid Christopher Chris Ferrera Lorna Harris Alex Tronolone Julie Desimone-Cadunzi Elyssa Paige Ellen Petillo Victoria Beddoe-Colella Melissa Holland Isabella Lucia

sharedPost.text:
Auditions announced for 
MS. HOLMES AND MS. WATSON - APT. 2B by Kate Hamill
Info/register here: https://forms.gle/6JPTUHcRPkW8gwht6
An irreverent, darkly comic, modern take on the world's most famous sleuth by one of theatre's most produced new playwrights. This fast-paced romp re-examines Sherlock Holmes adventures with a bold new feminist lens.
Auditions are April 12 & 13
Performances are May 15-17
More info: www.theatreonthehill.org/auditions

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Florian Müller darüber, dass Medienarbeit Beziehungsarbeit vorausgeht. 

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #schauspiel #acting #casting

items.text:
Hello everyone!

I am currently looking for a contract position as an flying pole performer. I am an experienced artist and open to long or short-term collaborations, shows, and professional engagements.

If you are interested or would like more information, please feel free to contact me via email: stasniko97@gmail.com

Thank you!

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM: “MY AIM IS TRUE”**
**(Vancouver, BC | NON-UNION)**

Indie film (10–15 minutes) seeking strong actors for two roles. Dramatic, literary, and dialogue-driven (inspired by a classic play).

**ROLES:**

**STEVE MATTICE (Male, 55–70) — LEAD**
A confident, gregarious, and happily married politician, who aspires to be party leader. He receives unsettling news that may damage his reputation.** Substantial role across full shoot.**

**SORAYA BAHAR (Female, 55–70) --SUPPORTING**

A veteran CBC journalist and Abigail Mattice’s (Steve’s wife’s) best friend and confidante. Her life is turned upside down by a revelation from her distant past.
**Smaller, dialogue-heavy role (approx. one scene / shorter shoot time).**

**SHOOT DETAILS:**
📍 East Vancouver, BC
🗓 1–2 shoot days (week of April 20) + 1 rehearsal

**PAY:**
💰 Steve Mattice: $200 stipend + meals
💰 Soraya Bahar: $100 stipend + meals

**PERKS:**
🎥 Festival submissions
🎬 Professional-quality reel footage
🤝 Focused, collaborative set

**TO APPLY:**
Please send by April 3rd:
• Headshot
• Short bio or résumé
• Reel/clips (if available, not required)

To  Kegan Doyle: [Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca](mailto:Kegan.doyle@kpu.ca)

Contact me if you have questions.

**This is a great opportunity for experienced actors who enjoy doing character-driven work.**

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film.

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

Who applied for other characters can submit their audition by 25th March. 

**Casting:**

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian. Shoot on 11th April.

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April.

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Kitsilano

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Character and your name”**

WARNER BROS FEATURE FILM - EXODUS
Work Date: April 30th, 2026
Rate: $250/8 + $30 gas bump
Location: La Grange, GA
Central Casting is now taking submissions for BABIES! 

Looking for 2 month old and 5 month old babies specifically. MUST HAVE DARK HAIR- having blue eyes as well is a bonus. Must be able to portray caucasian.

Baby must either be 2 months old OR 5 months old, or extremely close to it. 
If this is your baby, please submit the following:
• Clear recent full-body photo & head shot
• DOB of your baby
• Clothing sizes
• Full name of guardian & child
• Phone Number (formatted 000-000-0000)

Send submissions to:
pilot@centralcasting.com
Subject Line: BABY

items.text:
🎬 CALLING ALL CREATIVES– FULL CREW WANTED (LOS ANGELES) 🎬  

We’re assembling a passionate, driven team to bring a full-length feature film to life — and we’re looking for creatives who want to build something meaningful from the ground up.

📍 Location: Los Angeles (on-location shoots)  
🗓 Shoot Dates: May 10 – June 10  

Logline:

A man who built his life on control must lose everything before he can learn how to truly live.  

We are currently looking to fill the following positions 

- Executive producer

Directing department 

- 1st AD
- 2nd AD
- Script supervisor 

Lighting Department 

- Gaffer
- Lighting technician 

Sound Department 

- Sound Mixer
- Boom operator 

Production department 

- Art director 
- Costume designer 
- Make up artist 
- Hair stylist 
- Production (on location) manager
- Assistant Production manager 

Visuals

- Graphic designer/VFX artist 

This is a no-budget, passion-driven project, but we’re creating a professional, collaborative environment with a team that’s serious about storytelling and execution. Meals and transportation will be provided at no cost to crew and supplied daily. 

  What you’ll get:
• A chance to be part of a full feature film production  
• Hands-on experience and real set collaboration  
• Networking with a dedicated creative team  
• Meals provided daily (on us) 🍽  
• Transportation covered (on us) 🚐  
• A project you can truly put your name on and be proud of

🎥 This is for filmmakers who are hungry to create, grow, and be part of something bigger than just another short or side project. We’re building a team that shows up, collaborates, and pushes each other to make something great. We only admire bringing your good vibes on set and creating a positive and free creative environment for everybody, then we’ll be more than willing to have you on board.

If you’re interested, please fill out this form  below or reach out via email disconnectedmovie2026@gmail.com

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/1bFADoV10oTGB2Qb4AdMHoWRFVmvkHLb-ixG6mHlW758/edit?ts=69c471bf

Let’s make something special. 🚀

items.text:
**Emotional connection turns auditions into bookings.**

It’s the moment your work stops looking like acting and starts feeling real.

We just taught a live class on this  and coached it in real time so you can actually see the shift.

👉** Watch the replay:**

[https://www.youtube.com/live/D6GqQu8pXjQ?si=xWoIRfVShR9AeyFV](https://www.youtube.com/live/D6GqQu8pXjQ?si=xWoIRfVShR9AeyFV)

If your auditions feel close but you’re not booking… this is the piece most actors are missing.
items.previewTitle: Most Actors Are Faking Emotion… And Casting Knows - YOUR FREE ACTING CLASS
items.previewDescription: Most actors don’t have an emotional connection problem…They have a truth problem.If you’ve ever struggled with how to feel real in your auditions, how to cry...
items.title: Most Actors Are Faking Emotion… And Casting Knows - YOUR FREE ACTING CLASS

WARSZAWA – SOBOTA 28.03 

Poszukujemy osób do sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break 

 Lokalizacja: Warszawa – centrum

 Dyspozycyjność:  maksymalnie 1 h  (sesja trwa 20-30 min) 

Możliwość zapisu na dogodną godzinę w przedziale 9.00 - 14.00

 O projekcie:

Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji wizerunku). Projekt technologiczny ma na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich. 

 Stawka: 100 zł netto

 Płatność w gotówce zaraz po wykonaniu zdjęć

 Zgłoszenia:

Wyślij email na j.wujcik@stars-impresariat.pl

W treści podaj:

• imię i nazwisko

• numer telefonu

• aktualne zdjęcie

 Możesz zgłaszać znajomych i rodzinę !

 Liczba miejsc ograniczona

Hej! Do mojego 10-minutowego filmu szukam trzech osób:
1. Dziewczyna (18–22 lata) – blond włosy, najlepiej kręcone, jasne oczy

 2. Chłopak (22–24 lata) – ciemne włosy, brązowe oczy

 3. Chłopak (22–24 lata) – jasne włosy, jasne oczy

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej 😊

items.text:
🌸✨ II INTERNATIONAL ART COMPETITION
„SPRING ART FEST” ✨🌸

Wiosna to czas nowych początków, kolorów i inspiracji 🌷🎨
To właśnie teraz Twoja kreatywność może rozkwitnąć jak najpiękniejszy kwiat! Dołącz do „Spring Art Fest” i pokaż światu swój talent 🌍✨

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń: 27.03 – 10.04
💻 Udział w pełni zdalny — twórz, gdzie tylko chcesz!

🎭 Dlaczego warto?
🌟 Brak ograniczeń wiekowych;
🎨 Wszystkie nominacje i gatunki;
📡 Uczestnictwo zdalne!

🏆 Na uczestników czekają:
📜 Dyplomy i listy podziękowania;
🥇 Medale i puchary.

💡 Wiosna niesie ze sobą świeżą energię — wykorzystaj ją, aby stworzyć coś wyjątkowego! Każda praca to Twoja historia, emocje i pasja 💖

💰 Unikalny koszt uczestnictwa: 20 PLN

🌐 Szczegóły i zgłoszenia:
2gagencja.com

🌼 Niech Twoja twórczość rozkwitnie tej wiosny! Dołącz już dziś! 🎶🌿

items.text:
OGŁOSZENIE CASTINGOWE

Poszukuje dwóch tancerzy/tancerek w wieku 18-25 lat do współpracy przy koncertach.

Wymagania:

*   Doświadczenie taneczne (dowolny styl)
*   Kreatywność i zaangażowanie

Zgłoszenia wideo prosimy przesyłać na menager.kubising@wp.pl do 10 kwietnia 

Współpraca bezpłatna ( z czasem będzie płatna )

Zapraszamy!

🎬 CASTING – MĘŻCZYZNA DO FILMU INSTRUKTAŻOWEGO

Poszukiwany mężczyzna do udziału w filmie dla marki odzieżowej 

👤 Kogo szukamy?
• Mężczyzna w wieku ok. 35–50 lat
• Dojrzały, budzący zaufanie wygląd
• Bardzo dobra dykcja
• Naturalność przed kamerą

📍 Szczegóły realizacji:
• Lokalizacja: Koszalin
• Typ produkcji: film instruktażowy
• Casting płatny - stawka do ustalenia 

👉 Zgłoś się już teraz:
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112546

items.text:
**Open Call — The New Symposium**

The New Symposium invites applications from artists and practitioners working across music and related artistic disciplines —

Participants form an **interdisciplinary working group** and** develop their practice in dialogue with an international community **and **participate at the 6th edition of the Bled Contemporary Music Week!**

As an ongoing international forum and residency program, it creates a space for artistic development through weekly online exchange, cross-disciplinary collaboration, and long-term peer learning — more about the program: [https://thenewsymposium.com/description/](https://thenewsymposium.com/description/)

Apply **before March 31**, to join the program in April and festival in June —

[https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/](https://www.instagram.com/institut.abeceda/)

items.text:
**CHEKHOV WORLD THEATRE Summer Academy **

**July 12-18, 2026** in Hamburg 

**Michael Chekhov Acting Technique** meets

- **Organic Breathing** & **Image Work**

- **Kutiyattam Traditional Sanskrit Theatre** (Kerala, India) 

- **Physical Theatre and Dance** (Southeast Asia, India, Turkey) 

- **The Actor’s Energy and Presence **

- **Intercultural Theatre** in East Asia, India, Africa, and Europe 

Faculty: ***Jesper Michelsen***, Denmark; ***Remith Ramesh***, India; ***Gülhan Kadim***, Turkey; ***Yiğit Sertdemir***, Turkey; ***Suzana Nikolić***, Croatia; ***Ulrich Meyer-Horsch***, Germany; and guest artists from Southern Africa, Singapore, and India 

**TRAINING for PERFORMERS **

This annual intercultural encounter brings performance and training approaches from different continents and backgrounds into a practical exchange. You will intensively study the Michael Chekhov Acting Technique, and at the same time you will be in dialogue with other artistic traditions and performance techniques from around the globe. 

**INTERNATIONAL FESTIVAL**

There will be various workshop tracks in the morning and afternoon, followed by showcases, festival events and open classes in the evening. The daily training sessions can be combined so you will get a sense of each of the offered forms. 

The Summer Academy 2026 includes Michael Chekhov Europe’s Training Module 1: *Making Contact: Living Images*

Full announcement incl. application: **[[https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/](https://sfsh.de/international-summer-academy/sfsh10042/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHs3Du61hKx-Xu_1esnqI-ZLjbu4ix8Oehy_4URtXTvEGjvjthvv-xl6MV2bz_aem_MOHy7W1t_Klz6n0-wjRSIw)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsfsh.de%2Finternational-summer-academy%2Fsfsh10042%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAc3J0YwZhcHBfaWQQMjIyMDM5MTc4ODIwMDg5MgABHqtrNBt1FEZofEzNs9qJ3TfAeC5qwFl8aUzPE0tvnAwzuaqj6PYDcJoyacCN_aem_YVDUA2I-y0GQ1_9VFTtu7g&h=AT7kqcFpnROWzGn4vSx4Okbs9RnKRhVJzK01VC589zWbYmqlJkRq8GZ3f8W-9JLJRRYjVdyo6EF16dh97fg-dYu_vzKN6x50AcuzY3b0PUhrBO-76RYYOIFQkOhggQczaeNgiTWynDkD5YijE1vfCKrrZQ&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT68kXhGbIoKHjjghX2NZOU70d2_5-uRTj1HivM_ABOYFBmFC6cXGiUf8DijJCcl1uVSZjBMy-mW2q_UgpcFKuNH5ADYXQ2IGSVQmfZhiLlPJDsAU33VWxRooP0SEqgV9YHKLtaz_o_mY3SVgRSkvVFrrc-YPzSAwaQZUT6UfnKgqeE)**

Further information: chekhov@sfsh.de

items.text:
Hi everyone! We’re putting together a small independent film festival in Hollywood and wanted to invite fellow filmmakers, creatives, and anyone looking for something fun to come out.

This isn’t your typical sit-down-only screening — we’ve built it more as a full experience with:

🎬 Short film screenings
🍔 Food vendors
🍹 Bar
🎶 Live band + DJ
🎨 Interactive vendors & activations
🤝 Networking with other creatives

It’s also all-ages and family-friendly, with a lot of vendors and activities that keep kids entertained while adults can still enjoy the films, music, and atmosphere.

📍 Eastman Kodak Building (Hollywood)
📅 March 28

If you’re looking for something a little different from the usual film festival format, we’d love to have you there.

Feel free to message me for details!

items.text:
We might as well set up permanent residence at the NEC at this rate…!

This week our 20-strong Birmingham crew have been back doing what they do best — supporting the set-up of the incredible Call of Duty League 2026 – Major 2  

A huge event - a serious build and as always — the crew delivered!

The footage and photos say it all… busy, focused and getting stuck in.

Big credit to the Birmingham crew on this one — long days, tough shifts, but as always the job gets done. Quick recharge now before we’re back in for the de-rig Sunday/Monday.

 

FINAL CALL – Birthday Competition

We’re now heading into the last opportunity this weekend to enter.

We’ve had 45+ entries so far — thanks to the 8 clients who’ve already booked this month 

Still time to get involved:

 WIN a Crew Manager for a full day (FREE)

 Book before 31st March

 Work can take place up to 31st May

 Every booking = 1 entry

If you’ve got projects coming up and need reliable, hardworking crew:

 

020 3355 0513

 info@crewforcesolutions.com

Let’s finish March strong!!

items.summary:
We might as well set up permanent residence at the NEC at this rate…!

This week our 20-strong Birmingham crew have been back doing what they do best — supporting the set-up of the incredible Call of Duty League 2026 – Major 2  

A huge event - a serious build and as always — the crew delivered!

The footage and photos say it all… busy, focused and getting stuck in.

Big credit to the Birmingham crew on this one — long days, tough shifts, but as always the job gets done. Quick recharge now before we’re back in for the de-rig Sunday/Monday.

 

FINAL CALL – Birthday Competition

We’re now heading into the last opportunity this weekend to enter.

We’ve had 45+ entries so far — thanks to the 8 clients who’ve already booked this month 

Still time to get involved:

 WIN a Crew Manager for a full day (FREE)

 Book before 31st March

 Work can take place up to 31st May

 Every booking = 1 entry

If you’ve got projects coming up and need reliable, hardworking crew:

 

020 3355 0513

 info@crewforcesolutions.com

Let’s finish March strong!!
items.title: We might as well set up permanent residence at the NEC at this rate…!

items.text:
Are you looking for a weekly acting class for your child to attend after the Easter holidays? Oddity Acting TV & Film classes has a free trial for all new students for our Tuesday evening & Saturday morning sessions ✨

Led by industry professionals (actors & casting assistants), our classes help young performers build confidence, creativity, and performance skills while getting a real taste of the TV & Film world.
🌟 What to expect:
• Fun acting games & script work
• On-camera scene work & improvisation
• Self-tape experience & mock industry castings
• End-of-year short film productions 

📍 Location: All Hallows RC High School, M6 8AA
👦👧 Ages: 8–16
🎟 First trial class is FREE for all new students!

👉 Book your child’s free trial today: oddityacting.com/book-online

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR A COLLEGE FMP‼️‼️
Hi I’m a student at Weymouth College and this is for my final major project as a second year in college. 

Plot: The main character is in therapy talking about “the incident”, which brings us to a flashback. 

This character was having a regular day, making easy choices of which cereal to eat, which path to take to the shop, until they choose to litter, causing a bystander to step into the road leading to their death. We see a parent mourning at the hospital, before the flashback ends. 

Now, the therapists face is revealed and recognisable as the parent of the bystander. They wanted to capture the main characters confession on camera, this wasn’t a normal therapy session. Ends as we hear incoming sirens.

Location: Not yet specified but would be Dorset area

Casting Requirements: 

Therapist character - Adult 20+, no specified gender

Main Character (no given name yet) - Between the ages 18-20, no specified gender

Date and Time: Preferably a day to be chosen between the 6th April and the 19th April

Unpaid but I can pay for any travel costs if need, and would really appreciate any help on this important project!

Details of the location and character names will be built upon and confirmed later on

If interested feel free to respond to this post or email me at CaitlinFilmTv@outlook.com

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 13/2026

B MOVIE ACTION?,  EINE HORRORKÖMÖDIE UND DIE THEATERGRUPPE ZELLERNDORF IM TALK

Erinnerungen an die 80er Jahre werden wach, wenn Jason Statham sich zumindest einmal im Jahr durch einen Film durchkloppt (SHELTER). 

Dass Horrorfilme auch witzig sein können beweist der erste Film der Produktionsfirma Nocturna (THEY WILL KILL YOU) .

Ente gut, alles gut lautet das Stück der Theatergruppe Zellerndorf. Wir konnten mit insgesamt 5 Beteiligten an dieser Produktion Interviews führen. 

Abgerundet wird die Sendung  mit Awardwinnern best Song der letzten 90 Jahre sowie Musik aus den aktuellen Filmen.

Mittwoch 25.3.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Für eine Film-/Videoproduktion suchen wir eine ältere Schauspielerin mit folgendem Profil:
 • Weiblich, ca. 65–80 Jahre
 • Natürliches, authentisches Erscheinungsbild
 • Graue oder weiße Haare
 • Ausdrucksstarkes Gesicht, das Emotionen gut transportieren kann
 • Keine Model-Erfahrung notwendig – wichtig ist Glaubwürdigkeit

Rolle:
Eine ältere Frau in einer intensiven, emotionalen Situation (Schmerz/Unwohlsein wird dargestellt). Schauspielerische Ausdrucksstärke und Authentizität sind hier besonders wichtig.

Drehort: Kreis Recklinghausen
Drehzeit: April für einen Drehtag
Gage: kann gerne Privat besprochen werden

Bei Interesse bitte mit aktuellen Fotos und ggf. Referenzen melden 🙌

items.text:
Casting Call - Student Short Film
Hi everyone! 

I’m casting for a Brunel University student short film titled Echoes of Time - a warm, emotional drama about a university student reconnecting with childhood memories during a difficult time. 

📍Location: Uxbridge, London

🗓️Shoot dates: 20, 22, 24 April 2026

❕Unpaid (student production), but travel expenses will be covered. 

✨Great opportunity for actors looking to collaborate on a meaningful, visually driven student project. 

If you have any questions, feel free to message me!

items.text:
One For The Road CASTING CALL OPENED UP for “DAVE” SHOOTING DATES: 30th of April, 1st, 3rd of May 2026. Shooting in Holbeck, LEEDS. 

Dave and Rob have been best-friends for thirty years but when their favourite pub is due to close by the end of the night the pair fall out and twenty-two year old shop-lifter Jamie has to repair their friendship before the last bell.

 ‘One For The Road’ dives into masculinity, British identity, and the quiet weight of everyday working-class hardships. DAVE (40-60s) is a miserable, yorkshire man who has a very fatherly feel to him. 

If you’d like to apply please contact me privately or on instagram @georgiekayfilm

items.text:
Casting Call!!! 

Currently casting for a new TV show. Below are the requirements, if you know anyone who fits the bill, please get in touch ASAP!!! Drop me a DM!! 

✅ 18 - 24 year old white males
✅ Ideally from London
✅ Authentic London Accent 
✅ Ideally a free agent 
✅ Experience a bonus but not essential 
✅ Available to shoot from end of May

It is paid! Happy to explain more deets over a call!

topComments.text: Not sure if this was posted and only just accepted but, I know quite a few guys have sent out a message and taped as it needed to be cast asap, said they’d hear something back but haven’t. If you haven’t found the right person yet that’s fine but from an actors point - it’s always nice to hear back even if it’s a no

items.text:
Stimme • Herz • Show – Pur und Authentisch! 🎤✨

Wer mich kennt, weiß: Bei mir gibt es keine Maskerade und keine Drag-Show.

Ich stehe für 100% echtes Entertainment.

Das Besondere? Eine feminine Performance trifft auf meine natürliche, sonore Männerstimme. Ein Kontrast, der unter die Haut geht und bekannten Klassikern eine ganz neue Seele verleiht. 🎶

Egal ob:

✅ Kult & Legenden (Tribute Shows)
✅ Party & Energie (Schlager-Remixe & Pop)
✅ Gefühl & Tiefgang (Chansons & Liedermacher)

Ich bin weltweit für euch unterwegs – zu Lande, zu Wasser und überall dort, wo gute Musik und echte Emotionen gebraucht werden. 🌍🚢

Lust auf ein maßgeschneidertes Live-Erlebnis?

Schaut euch die Details im Flyer an oder schreibt mir direkt eine DM! 📩

#MathiasMarieKaiser #LiveGesang #eventhighlight #KreuzfahrtShow #transartist

items.text:
Hi all! 

I just wanted to introduce myself! I’ve been on dozens of TV shows, films and narrated award winning audiobooks.  Happy to connect to the community ❤️😊

Www.donnabellamortel.com

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin gesucht für Sitcom-Serie! 🎬
Wir sind aktuell mitten in den Dreharbeiten zu unserer Sitcom und suchen noch Verstärkung für unser Team!  

Wen wir suchen:  

- Frau, Alter: ca. 20–40 Jahre  

- Erscheinung: blond, blauäugig  

- Ausstrahlung: frech, humorvoll, locker drauf und natürlich mit Charakter  

- Erfahrung: nicht notwendig!  

Wichtig:  

- Du solltest zuverlässig sein  

- Wohnort idealerweise in der Nähe von Koblenz  

- Dreh findet jedes Wochenende statt  

- Projekt ist unbezahlt (no budget / unpaid)  

⚠️ Wichtig: Morgen ist bereits ein Drehtag – es wäre super, wenn wir bis dahin schon jemanden finden!  

Wenn du Lust hast, Teil eines kreativen Projekts zu werden und vor der Kamera zu stehen, dann melde dich gerne bei uns!  

📩 Schreib uns einfach eine DM mit ein paar Infos über dich (gerne auch mit Foto)!  

Wir freuen uns auf dich! 🎥✨

items.text:
INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL:

Genre: Existential horror

Title: Beyond Now 

Logline: A group of close-knit friends get together for one last hurrah. What awaits them are horrors that will change their lives in ways they could never prepare for.

Production company: Bench-Top Productions 

Contact info: beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com

IMPORTANT NOTE: These roles have hard shoot dates over April, May, and October. If submitting please confirm full availability for the dates listed for each specific role. The audition deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

ROLES:

Hailey, Lead female: Early to Mid 30’s

Mom of the group. Overly Responsible. Protective of her friends and family. Cautious about her partner Ethan’s Anxiety. Hailey organized this trip as a final ‘hurrah’ to announce her pregnancy.

Shoot dates: 4/9, 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/17, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 4/21, 5/9, 5/10, 5/11, 5/12, 5/16, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Brooke, Supporting female: Late 20’s - Early 30’s 

Wannabe Instagram influencer. Super jealous of her friend Megan and her “so-called career.” One of the class clowns of the group. She has a ‘Team Rocket Jesse and James’ dynamic with her best friend Chris from their years working together in a coffee shop. Strongly copes with humor. Hyperfixates on her special interests: photography, true crime and mystics.

Shoot dates: 4/10, 4/13, 4/14, 4/18, 4/19, 4/20, 5/7, 5/10, 10/16, 10/17, 10/18 

Compensation: IMDB credit, meal and reel. 

Union status: Non-union

Shoot locations: Conifer, Golden and Denver CO

AUDITION INFORMATION: Auditions will be held via selftape. To receive sides and selftape instructions, please send a headshot, resume and reel to beyondnowproduction@protonmail.com with which role you're submitting for and a confirmation of availability for the dates listed for that role. The deadline is 10:00 PM FRIDAY 3/27 and this casting call will close on that deadline. 

IMDB: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39849599/?ref_=nm_knf_t_2)

items.text:
VRASP is expanding and we have a class for you.

Whether you are in London or Hampshire, VRASP is bringing professional screen acting training to your city and we want you in the room.

We are not a drama club. We are a screen acting school run by working industry professionals, and every class is designed to give you real, practical skills for film and TV. From your very first session you will be learning the same techniques used on professional sets, getting honest feedback, and building the kind of presence that gets you noticed on camera.

We currently have classes running in two locations:

London - Brixton
Adult Drop-In · Ages 18+ · £20 per session

Southampton — Hampshire
Adult Classes - From £15
Teen Class · Ages 13–17 · £20 per session

VRASP students gets access to:

Expert screen acting training from working industry professionals

Practical film and TV performance techniques

Camera confidence and on-screen presence coaching

Audition technique and self-tape preparation

Scene study, character work and emotional access.

Professional headshots and showreel footage through your training

VIP industry networking events.

Red carpet and industry events alongside founder Verona Rose and the wider VRASP Community.

VRASP was founded by Verona Rose - actress, writer, director and presenter, known for Netflix's Top Boy, BBC's Horrible Histories, BBC Three's Fully Blown and ITV2's Secret Crush. 

All abilities welcome. No experience needed. Just bring yourself and your ambition.
Find out more and book at www.vrasp.co.uk

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwaUlSaWROY0ZBeDIyUTVxa3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5vTBeyeH0HJxJWJFTDJdlmo_R3DTcg-cnl7hhmjDptX4q9GY1AMBXI88V9MA_aem_UGPIP_GOUGnKLa_xKaBQng)

items.text:
**🎬 Casting Call — Kandor Kin**

**Vertical Micro-Drama Series · Burbank, CA · March 30th**

**UNPAID · PORTFOLIO / REEL CREDIT**

We're casting two lead roles for **Kandor Kin** — a vertical narrative series following a self-sustaining creative collective. Shot in one day, three episodes, one location. Intimate, dialogue-driven, cinematic.

This is an unpaid opportunity. We're looking for actors who want a quality project for their portfolio and a team that takes the work seriously.

OPEN ROLES

**ASHA — Lead Producer**

BLACK MAN · 30S · OPEN TO TYPE

The architect of the collective. He leads through quiet authority — structured, intentional, every word chosen. He doesn't raise his voice because he doesn't have to. Think stillness as power. He's built something real and he knows it. The role requires presence more than performance.

**ZORA — Member in Training**

WOMAN · 20S · OPEN ETHNICITY

She arrives guarded and leaves with her shoulders down for the first time in a while. Her arc is almost entirely physical — a slow exhale across the episode. Most of what she communicates happens between the lines. Looking for someone who can make a salad order feel like the end of a journey.

**SHOOT DETAILS**

TIME1:00 PM – 8:00 PM

LOCATION: Burbank, CA (full address on confirmation)

FORMATVertical (9:16) — shot for mobile

To submit — comment with the role you're interested in and a brief note about yourself. Sides will be sent to those selected for a self-tape.

topComments.text:
I’d be interested in the role of Zora. 
Hello, My name is Yasmin Sant-Anna, I am 28 years old, and I am Brazilian. I studied at numerous theater schools in Brazil, and I currently live in Los Angeles. I am eager to learn more about the art scene here and to be part of projects to gain experience.
I appreciate the opportunity.
I’d be interested in the role of Zora! I have over 20 verticals I was in since last year!

message.text:
🎥 In diesem Reel spricht Lisa Seidl, LLM über digitale Plattformen schaffen Macht-Assymetrien und neue Abhängigkeiten.

👉 Sei dabei beim nächsten KBF! ✨☕️ 

📍 167. Künstler*innen Business Frühstück 
🗓️ Dienstag, 07.04.2026 – 7:15 Uhr 
🏨 Hotel Zeitgeist Vienna, Sonnwendgasse 15, 1100 Wien 

🎤 Vortrag: Marion Rossmann 
🎙️ Moderation: Andreas Huber 

Casting und Besetzung international – worauf kommt es wirklich an? 

Marion Rossmann ist eine erfahrene Casting Directorin mit über zwei Jahrzehnten Erfahrung in der Film- und Fernsehbranche. Sie hat an zahlreichen nationalen und internationalen Produktionen mitgewirkt. In ihrem Vortrag gibt sie Einblicke in den internationalen Casting-Prozess, berichtet über Unterschiede und Gemeinsamkeiten zwischen verschiedenen Ländern, erklärt die Anforderungen an Schauspieler*innen für internationale Produktionen und gibt praktische Tipps zur Vorbereitung auf (internationale) Castings. 

Ein Frühstück für alle, die in der Film- und Fernsehbranche tätig sind oder sich für internationale Besetzungsprozesse und Karrieremöglichkeiten interessieren. 

© Ch. Pilsl 

📲 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung: www.KünstlerBusinessFrühstück.at 
und https://fb.me/e/6KqWp3MQS 

#künstlerinnenbusinessfrühstück #kbf #zeitgeistvienna  #schauspiel #acting #casting

items.text: Statister søges til optagelser i København.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'STATISTER SOGES I forbindelse med optagelserne til en ny, dansk spillefilm soger Hyane Film statister (15+) af alle kon/typer, kon/ der har lyst til at spille passagerer en metro. Dato: Tirsdag. april Lokation: Kebenhavn Tidsrum: 11.15-13.45 Som tak for din medvirken vil du modtage en biografbillet, og vi vil selvfolgelig gore vores bedste for at skabe en god og spzendende oplevelse! Vil du vaere med? Send en mail til statist@hyaenefilm.dk, statist@hya og vedhaeft et vellignende foto + fulde navn, alder, telefonnummer og e-mail. Du bedes skrive folgende i emnefeltet: "METRO" Vi glaeder OS meget til at hore fra dig!'

topComments.text: Jannick Albrecht Jannie Nielsen skal vi
Mads Akes Hansen Se lige det her :-)

items.summary: Statister søges til optagelser i København.
items.title: Statister søges til optagelser i København.

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Hi everyone! 

We're casting for the short film 'The Way of the Lamb', shooting end of April/Early May around Copenhagen.It’s a period piece set in 1920s Denmark. 

The film follows a boy’s spiritual discovery and explores life after death.

You can read more about the project here: https://filmdaily.co/indie-film/film-festivals/way-of-the-lamb-daniel-knights-spiritual-coming-of-age-wins-first-franzi-shorts-competition/

**We're looking for 5 roles:**

-8-10 year-old boy (Protagonist) 

-10-13 year-old female (Sister) 

-35-50 year-old male (Dad) 

-+50 year-old female (Grandma) 

+50 year-old male (Priest) 

The film will be spoken in Danish, so no English fluency is required, but advised, as we're working with an international crew. 

We will be holding auditions for these roles, so please email us on **wayofthelamb@franzifilms.com** if you're interested or know someone who might be :)

Unfortunately, as it's a short film (and it's very tough to get a budget for these projects), nobody is getting a salary. We're looking for someone who's mostly looking to have fun and go on this ride with us for the love of it, get good material for their reel, and go to festivals. 

I'm directing, Zoe Stiletano is producing, Daniel Knight is the writer, and Nick Gray is the DP. It's produced by www.franzifilms.com 

Looking forward to getting you on the team! 🙌

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – INDIE NO-BUDGET FILM** 🎬

Hi everyone! I’m looking to cast a **female actor** for a small but important role in an indie short film.

🎭 **Role:** Day Care Teacher
* Female
* Age: 30–40
* Warm, natural, and expressive presence

📍 **Location:** Surrey
📅 **Date:** 4th April
⏱️ **Duration:** Approx. 2 hours shoot

🎥 **Details:**
* Volunteer / non-paid position
* Light, manageable shoot with a small crew

✨ **What you’ll get:**
* IMDb credit
* Crafty (food & refreshments on set)
* Opportunity to be part of a passion-driven indie project

If you’re interested or know someone who fits the role, please send your **headshot and a link to any previous work** on **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Thank you! 🙏

items.text:
Vancouver Casting Call!

Casting senior actors for a quiet but powerful story about love, memory, and time.

As this is an independent project with limited resources, we are unable to provide travel or accommodation support. We kindly ask that applicants be based in Vancouver or able to arrange their own travel.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL This independent movie explores the nuanced experiences and stories of minorities. SEEKING THE FOLLOWING ROLES East Asian Female, 60s+ East Asian Male, 60s+ COMPENSATION SUBMISSION BENEFITS PayRoll Credit: Screen credit provided Meals: Full catering provided on set (Lunch & Dinner) Email: joemg0689C gmail com( 1st A.D) atharv.maakaamal@gmail.com gmail .com (2nd A.D) •Location: Vancouver, BC Deadline: April 11th, 2026 Please submit your headshot, resume, and 1-2 minute acting video.'

items.text:
𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗮𝗹𝗹: 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗠𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗻𝗶𝗮𝗹
𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗧𝘆𝗽𝗲: Short Film / Proof of Concept (Non-union)

𝗗𝗲𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗽𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻

This is a brief proof of concept (under 5 minutes) for a complete short film currently in development. The project is a cinematic reconstruction of a true story. We are producing this self-contained excerpt to establish the visual style, tone, and narrative direction of the larger film.

𝗟𝗼𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲

A psychological drama about the story of an immigrant who finds himself facing a choice in a difficult life situation: to continue working hard at the port or to finally realize and follow his dream.

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝘁𝗮𝗶𝗹𝘀

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: OFF MIRROR Studio

𝗗𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗼𝗿: V. Chase Malukha

𝗣𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗰𝗲𝗿: Maryna Malukha

𝗦𝗵𝗼𝗼𝘁 𝗗𝗮𝘁𝗲𝘀: 1-2 days, March 27 or March 28

𝗟𝗼𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Vancouver

𝗥𝗮𝘁𝗲 𝗼𝗳 𝗣𝗮𝘆: Volunteer. Meals, copy for reel, and credit provided.

𝗥𝗢𝗟𝗘:

𝗟𝗘𝗔𝗗 – Male, 25-40

𝗖𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗿 𝗕𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗸𝗱𝗼𝘄𝗻:

• 𝗣𝗿𝗲𝘀𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 / 𝗚𝗮𝘇𝗲: We are looking for depth and intelligence. The actor must be able to "hold the frame in silence," allowing the audience to read his internal monologue.

• 𝗠𝗶𝗰𝗿𝗼-𝗲𝘅𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: The ability to convey quiet panic, disorientation, and intense internal struggle without overacting.

• 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: The ability to organically transition from a state of complete powerlessness and despair to a sudden epiphany and newfound grounding.

𝗩𝗶𝘀𝘂𝗮𝗹 𝗖𝗼𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘅𝘁:

Urban noir aesthetic. Isolation in a crowd, the cold light of a metropolis, the intimacy of an epiphany. This is highly internalized acting (working "under the skin").

𝗦𝗨𝗕𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗦𝗜𝗢𝗡 & 𝗦𝗘𝗟𝗙-𝗧𝗔𝗣𝗘 𝗜𝗡𝗦𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗖𝗧𝗜𝗢𝗡𝗦:

Please submit your Headshot, Resume/Profile link, and Self-Tape to: maryna@offmirror.studio

𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗷𝗲𝗰𝘁 𝗟𝗶𝗻𝗲: THE MILLENNIAL - your name

• 𝗦𝗲𝗹𝗳-𝗧𝗮𝗽𝗲 𝗜𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀: Prepare a silent scene (up to 2 minutes). Theatricality and overacting are strictly discouraged.

• 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝗺𝗶𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻 𝗗𝗲𝗮𝗱𝗹𝗶𝗻𝗲: March 25, 11:59 PM. (We are casting on a tight turnaround).

items.text:
🚨 URGENT! LOOKING FOR ACTOR / ANIMATOR / DANCER
📅 April 1–2 | Warsaw

We urgently need a replacement for the main actor for an immersive show.

🎭 Looking for an actor, animator, or dancer (any nationality / any native language).

Lines will be in English (not many) and are already prepared — you just need to perform them on stage with music.

💪 Athletic build preferred

📩 Please DM

🔥 Immersive show | Warsaw | Live performance

items.text:
Uwaga!!! Rozpoczynamy nowy - 21. sezon Gliniarzy!!!
Do najnowszych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję mężczyzn do następujacych ról:

1)Grzegorz Krawczyk (30) – diler, zostaje zamordowany, niewyróżniające się ubranie w stylu sportowym, cwaniak. 

Data: 15. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

2)Klient (28) – klient dilera, dresy, czapka z daszkiem, nie wygląda na narkomana, tylko „rekreacyjnie” zażywającego, zestresowany. 

Data: 15. kwietnia

Stawka: 300 zł netto

3)Jerzy Kwiatkowski (50) – były wojskowy, major (sam odszedł), chłodny, surowy, w środku cierpi po przedawkowaniu i śmierci córki. 

Data: 15. kwietnia

Stawka: 600 zł netto

4)Łukasz Śliwiński (56) – były przełożony Jerzego, pułkownik, chroni swoich ludzi, czuje się bezkarny. Pewny siebie, Ma wysoko postawionych znajomych i to wykorzystuje. Grozi w zawoalowany sposób. 

Data: 18. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

5)Siwy, Mateusz Siwek (44) – boss narkotykowy, bezwzględny, wzbudza respekt, mściwy, ceni lojalność, ale potrafi kalkulować. Może być napakowany, łysy.

Data: 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 600 zł netto

6)Gangster 1 (34) – człowiek Siwego, jego prawa ręka, uzbrojony, wygadany, 

Data: 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 500 zł netto

7. Gangster 2 (28) – człowiek Siwego, z bronią - rola bez tekstu

Data: 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

8.Świadek (57) – okulary, kiepski wzrok. Poczciwy, starszy pan. 

Data: 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

9.Porywacz 1 (30) – zbir i kryminalista.

Data: 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

10. Porywacz 2 (38) – z wyglądu kryminalista, napakowany i silny. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 13. i 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

11.Jaworski (26) – kryminalista, który poszedł na współpracę z prokuraturą. Typ drobnego cwaniaczka. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 13. i 14. kwietnia

Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

12.Gangus (37) – napakowany zbir z szajki narkotykowej. 

Data: 13. kwietnia

Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe

4. Aktualne zdjęcie

5. Krótki opis doświadczenia

6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich

7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Uwaga!!! Rozpoczynamy nowy - 21. sezon Gliniarzy!!!
Do najnowszych odcinków 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję kobiet do następujacych ról:

1. Sandra Kowalska (27) – dziewczyna Krawczyka uzależniona od narkotyków, z wyrokiem za posiadanie, nerwowa, pod wpływem dragów, agresywna, ale też się boi, płacze, jak narkotyki z niej schodzą. Luźny styl ubierania. 

Data: 15. i 18. kwietnia

Stawka: 1000 zł netto za całość

2. Jaworska (50) – typ skromnej gospodyni z przedmieść Warszawy. Ma syna kryminalistę, który nauczył ja strzelać. 

Data: 13., 14. i 15. kwietnia

Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne Panie zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga

2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu

items.text:
**POSZUKIWANI STAND-IN DO MIĘDZYNARODOWEJ PRODUKCJI** 

Poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę **stand-in dla zagranicznych ambasadorów marki**

 🎯**Kogo szukamy?**
Osób, które są zbliżone wyglądem i wymiarami  
👉są gotowe nauczyć się kilku zdań w danym języku (lub powiedzieć je fonetycznie)
👉mile widziane osoby, które już posługują się jednym z języków

💸**Wysokie Stawki!!**

 🎥**Terminy zdjęć i języki:**

 🔵 **RALF (jęz. NIEMIECKI)**

**WZROST: 168 / BLONDYN / RUDY / WYMIARY: KL. PIERSIOWA: 98 / PAS: 88, BIODRA: 99, BUT: 38/38**
 7.04, 8.04, 9.04

 🔵 **VINCENT (jęz. FRANCUSKI)**
 10.04, 11.04

WZROST: 186

CZARNE CIEMNE WŁOSY / ZAROST, BRODA

SIZE: XL , SHOES 42

**Ludzie@unagimedia.pl**

items.text:
CASTING ACTORS FOR FIGHT SCENE IN FEATURE FILM!!

Title: Saturdays

Genre: Thriller/Comedy

Logline: After accidentally taking a new designer drug on the way to a Halloween party, three broke nobodies become viral vigilantes in a city on the edge but their rise to infamy puts them in the cross-hairs of a charismatic cartel leader.

Role:

Carlos (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Hugo (30-50) High ranking cartel member

Knuckles (20-40) Drug packer

Diesel (20-40) Drug packer

Brick (20-40) Drug packer

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Loste Films

Contact Information: luke@lostefilms.com

Run Time: Feature

Compensation: Catering/Crafty provided during proof of concept shoot. Compensation for future shoot dates is open to negotiation.

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume and reel. Stunt experience preferred.

Shooting Schedule: March 28-29th. 11am call time both days.

Filming Location: Denver

Project Description: Saturdays is an upcoming feature film we’re currently shooting the beginning of to use as a proof of concept. The scenes in the proof of concept are still being used in the final movie, which will be shot later on in the year. We’re ideally looking for actors with stunt experience.

IMDB Link: [https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/](https://www.imdb.com/title/tt39423188/)

items.text:
Title: Lamotrigine 

Genre: Drama 

Logline: A woman’s day is derailed after retrieving an old jacket from her ex. 

Roles: 

Sophie (F, mid 20s): Madi’s good friend who is now married and living in the suburbs. 

Luna (F, early-mid 20s-30s): Trans woman. An old classmate of Madi’s who reconnects with her at a train station. 

Dream Woman: (F, 20s-30s): A tall figure who appears in Madi’s dream. 

Director: Ryleigh Dorman

Producer: Frances McIlvain

Indie, micro-budget, nonunion 

Compensation: Flat fee, negotiable 

Shooting Schedule: Looking at a handful of dates across April-June of 2026. 

Location: In & around the Denver-Boulder area 

Audition Information: email mcilvainbiz@gmail.com with headshot and reel or relevant reference material.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – MUSIC VIDEO: “ARE WE STILL FRIENDS?”
 
We are casting for a cinematic, narrative-driven music video exploring love, memories, and heartbreak through the journey of a relationship.
ROLES AVAILABLE:
 
Male Lead (Protagonist)
 • Age: 16–20
 • Must be expressive and able to show a range of emotions (happy, in love, frustrated, heartbroken)
 • Comfortable on camera in both performance and cinematic scenes
 • No acting experience required
Female Lead (Love Interest)
 • Age: 16–20
 • Must be natural and expressive with strong on-screen chemistry
 • Role includes subtle romantic acting (e.g. walking together, holding hands)
 • No acting experience required
 
SHOOT DETAILS:
 • Location: London & Surrey (including Kingston)
 • Key London Locations: South Bank, Southbank Pier, Soho, Oxford Street, Chinatown
 • Surrey/Kingston Locations: Kingston (Tenpin), local streets, riverside areas
 • Dates: April 1–3 (likely only needed for 2 days will only need third for possibly reshoots)
 • Schedule:
 ◦ 1 day filming in London
 ◦ 1 day filming in Surrey/Kingston
 • Local applicants only (London/Surrey area preferred)
 • Unpaid student project – great for experience and portfolio work
 
STYLE & COSTUME:
 • Streetwear / casual aesthetic, if wanted will supply reference images (hoodies, baggy jeans, neutral tones)
 • You may be asked to bring multiple outfit options
 
HOW TO APPLY: Please send:
 • Name + Age
 • Recent photo(s)
 • Short intro video (optional but recommended)
 • Any acting experience (if applicable)
 
CONTACT:
-Oscar Wright
-ozziew09@gmail.com
-+44 07784 854147

items.text:
**School of Uke is hiring — **If you're an actor, performer, musician or creative looking for fun paid work, we’d love to hear from you. Please send cv and cover email to [info@schoolofuke.co.uk](mailto:info@schoolofuke.co.uk)

**Are you…**

 🌟 Outgoing and charismatic?

 🎭 An Actor, Singer or Performer?

 🎶 Passionate about music?

 🎸 A Ukulele/Guitar Player or Singer?

**School of Uke is a full-volume entertainment experience** that transforms how people connect with music. 

We’re on the lookout for **charismatic actors, singers, performers, and musicians** to join our teaching team of Lead and Assistant Tutors in London, Bristol and Brighton. If you play the **ukulele or guitar, and/or sing** and love entertaining a crowd, this could be for you.

**School of Uke is all about exploring music together** — unlocking confidence, connection, and creativity through the songs you love.

So if you’re a performer or singer** **and can entertain a room full of people **we want to hear from you!**

You’re also invited to come meet us at our **Easter Party and 51st Showcase** on Wed 1st April and see what we’re all about. **DM for guest-list **✨👠🎶

▶️ **What we do:**[ ](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno)[https://youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno](https://youtube.com/shorts/IXuRtB4Deno)

message.text: I am casting 2 PSA’s and Seeking Non-Union Actors with Acting Resumes to portray the following types:PSA #1:Elderly Man (75–85 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500Pharmacist (Male, 25–26 open ethnicity) - Rate: $500* Doctor (Black, 40’s any gender) - Rate: $300* Customer (Asian any gender, around 40) - Rate: $300* Worker (Female, open Ethnicity around 30) - Rate: $300PSA  #2: Elderly Woman (75–85): Rate: $500Mother (40): Middle Eastern or Latina preferred - Rate: $500Father (around 45): White - Rate: $500Teenage Boy (15): White - Rate: $500Woman (50): White - Rate: $500Man (around 50): White - Rate: $500Young Black Woman (20’s) - Rate: $500Black Man (around 30) - Rate: $500Middle-aged Asian Man - Rate: $500If you fit the bill please send an email to:JodiPurdyCasting@gmail.comSubj:  PSA - List RoleIncludeName, Cell, Email, Location, Photos, Resume, Reel (If available), VideosI will reply to emails with further instructions!These are paid roles.Filming in Greater BostonOne Day Between 4/3 & 4/7YOU MUST SUBMIT PER INSTRUCTIONS TO BE CONSIDERED.  COMMENTING ON POSTS IS NOT SUBMITTING #casting #commercial #$500 #$300 #principal #extra #jodipurdycasting

Rote, Grüne, Braune und Schwarze Eier.
Diese Farben braucht kein Huhn.

items.text:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.

items.summary:
Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show 

Dieses kurze Interview mit Ralf ist in einem persönlichen Moment vor dem Studio entstanden, im Umfeld der heute-show und kurz vor unserem Bühnenmoment zur Folge vom 20. März. Für mich war das ein sympathisches, spontanes und pointiertes Gespräch, in dem sofort spürbar wurde, wie viel Präsenz, Charme und Schlagfertigkeit Ralf Scharrer mitbringt. 

Im Mittelpunkt stehen sein Name, seine öffentliche Wirkung, seine markante Ausstrahlung und genau die Leichtigkeit, mit der aus wenigen Sätzen ein unterhaltsamer Clip wird. 

Viele kennen Ralf Scharrer als Schauspieler, doch in diesem kurzen Ausschnitt zeigt sich vor allem auch seine persönliche Art, direkt, humorvoll und mit einem sicheren Gespür für Wirkung. Genau das macht solche kurzen Begegnungen für mich interessant. Sie sind ungeplant, nahbar und oft viel prägnanter als lange Gespräche. Gerade deshalb wollte ich diesen Moment festhalten und mit Dir teilen. 

Wenn Dir solche spontanen Interviewmomente aus dem Medienumfeld gefallen, freue ich mich über Deinen Kommentar, Dein Like und Dein Abo. Schreib mir gern, welcher Satz oder welcher Moment von Ralf Scharrer Dir in diesem Clip am meisten im Kopf geblieben ist. 

Danke, Christian Weiße aka Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Image- und Eventfilmproduktion  Inh. Christian Weiße 

#RalfScharrer #ChristianWeisse #heuteshow #ZDF #Interview #Schauspiel #Medienmoment #Köln #Kurzinterview #TVMoment 

Das gezeigte Kurzinterview entstand vor Beginn des Drehs in einem Flurbereich vor dem Studio im Umfeld der Produktion, zeigt keine vertraulichen Inhalte oder unzulässigen Bildmotive und dokumentiert ausschließlich einen persönlichen, eigenständig entstandenen Begegnungsmoment zwischen Christian Weiße und Ralf Scharrer.
items.title: Ralf Scharrer im Kurzinterview, ein spontaner Medienmoment vor der heute-show

Hi, all.
My names Safiya I’m a third year student studying journalism but I also do acting. For my course I’m doing a short form podcast titled the “reality of pursuing acting”.

This would be questions related conversations on what it’s like to pursue acting from different perspectives.
 
Im looking to speak to:
1.) A actor who has or is in acting/drama school
2.)A actor who hasn’t been to acting school but is pursuing acting 
3.) A drama, acting or theatre coach/teacher 
4.) Casting director

Anyone can get in touch via facebook messenger or my email Safiya.warrior@hotmail.co.uk

I can send you more details on what this entails but that is the general bases.

Thank you!

items.text:
Craxis Studios Casting Call for Indie Film
Title: Despondence

Genre: Coming of Age/Drama

Logline: A sick teenager flees his abusive home in search of freedom, meeting new people as he goes, but as life on the road unravels and the weight of what he left behind begins to close in, he’s forced to confront the truth that some things can’t be outrun.

Production Type: Indie

Production Company: Craxis Studios

Contact information: craxisstudios@gmail.com

Run Time: 45min-1hr

Compensation: While monetary compensation currently isn’t possible, the studio hopes that it can be, as of now Compensation will be in Food and Credits. 

Audition Information: Send an email with headshot, resume, and reel if you have one. 

Filming Location: Denver-Aurora 

Project Description: Despondence is a character-driven short film about grief, memory, and the illusion of escape. It follows a teenager who leaves behind a troubled home in search of something better, only to confront the emotional weight of what he can’t outrun. Despondence also being the start of our studio.

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwaUlSaWROY0ZBeDIyUTVxa3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5vTBeyeH0HJxJWJFTDJdlmo_R3DTcg-cnl7hhmjDptX4q9GY1AMBXI88V9MA_aem_UGPIP_GOUGnKLa_xKaBQng)

Andrew Lloyd Webber’s School of Rock! 🎸 Get ready to rock at the StoryHouse Theatre!
This high-energy musical follows wannabe rock star Dewey Finn as he turns a class of students into an epic rock band, packed with incredible live music, big laughs, and feel-good moments for all ages.

🔥 Don’t miss this electrifying show that will have you cheering, singing, and tapping your feet from start to finish!

🎟️ Book your tickets now: https://www.storyhouse.com/whats-on/mapa-school-of-rock/

#SchoolOfRock #Theatre #LiveMusic #Storyhouse #ChesterEvents #MajesticProductions
items.previewDescription: Get ready to turn up the volume and feel the power of rock like never before! Inspired by the hit movie School of Rock, this electrifying stage musical is packed with high-energy performances, unforgettable songs, and a whole lot of attitude.

items.text:
The lost piano

Ich glaube, dass das Leben oft mehr durch das definiert wird, was wir nicht tun, als durch das, was wir tun. Obwohl der Film etwas traurig wirkt, liegt genau darin seine positive Botschaft. Es geht um verpasste Chancen, die wir täglich nutzen sollten.

Aus diesem Grund entfaltet sich meine Filmmusik erst ganz am Ende. Gib deinem Leben die Chance, die es braucht, um sich zu erfüllen.

Filmmusik und Sounddesign: Jürgen Hochfeld, 

[https://youtu.be/LxXKhNFLSIU](https://youtu.be/LxXKhNFLSIU)

items.text:
Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz

 

 

Du liebst Theater, Menschen und kulturelle Vielfalt?

 

Dann ist das deine Chance:

Am 07.04.2026 startet unsere anerkannte Weiterbildung Theaterpädagogik BuT®️ mit interkultureller Kompetenz 🌍✨

 

 

📚 Das erwartet dich:

•             13 Monate Vollzeit

•             1950 Unterrichtseinheiten inkl. 300 UE Praktikum

•             Unterricht: Mo–Fr, 09:00–16:00 Uhr

•             Praxisnahes Arbeiten mit Szenen, Projekten & Performances

•             Interkulturelle Kompetenz als fester Bestandteil der Ausbildung

•             BuT®️-anerkannt

 

🎓 Wichtig zu wissen:

Mit dem BuT®️-Abschluss ist auch eine Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft möglich

(nach § 11 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 VOKitaFöG und § 16 Abs. 3 Nr. 1 SchüFöVO).

 

Dieser Quereinstieg ist mit bestimmten Auflagen verbunden und kann in die Anerkennung als sozialpädagogische Fachkraft münden.

 

100% Förderbar mit BIldungsgutschein

 

 

Selbstzahler:innen sind herzlich Wilkommen. Auch für Selbstzahlende ist eine Förderung durch KOMPASS möglich.

 

 

📩 Mehr Infos & Anmeldung:

info@adkb-berlin.de

🌐 www.adkb-berlin.de

📞 030 – 405 35040

 

Bewirb Dich Jetzt!

 

Mach mit – und bring Theaterpädagogik & Vielfalt in Bewegung! 🎭💫

#Theaterpädagogik #Berlin #BuT #Weiterbildung #InterkulturelleKompetenz #adkb #Theaterliebe #Quereinstieg #Sozialpädagogik

items.text:
Twelve Casting Call
After a fatal car crash, Michael is given twelve seconds between life and death to relive the defining moments of his past—confronting love, loss, and regret—as he searches for a way to say goodbye to the person who matters most: his daughter, Lucy.

Michael

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

Michael on his 30’s

 defined by the heavy intersection 

of grief and redemption. He is physically and

emotionally "soaked"—tense, weary, and 

gripped by the stress of a

life spent trying to outrun his past. 

Michael is a protector who 

"had to grow up fast," and

while he dies with regrets, 

his final moments are defined by a

selfless need to ensure his daughter, 

Lucy, knows she is loved.

Male: 30’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

The Guide

The Guide serves as the ethereal bridge 

between life and death. 

She is young (20’s) 

with golden-strawberry hair, 

possessing a "gentle, steady gaze" 

that suggests ancient

 wisdom despite her youthful appearance.

Her attire—a dark cloak over white robes—

visually represents the transition from the darkness 

of the void to the light of the afterlife. 

She is not a judge, but a witness; she watches

Michael’s memories with "grace" and "calm," 

Female: 20’s 

Ethnicity: Any

———————————————————————

Format: Short

Date: T.B.A

Status : Non-Union/Union

Location: MA/ RI

Compensation: Paid

Resumes - Headshots - Reels to :

Info@vipexproductions.com

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwaUlSaWROY0ZBeDIyUTVxa3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5vTBeyeH0HJxJWJFTDJdlmo_R3DTcg-cnl7hhmjDptX4q9GY1AMBXI88V9MA_aem_UGPIP_GOUGnKLa_xKaBQng)

items.text:
Hi there,

My name is Kieran McKeown, and I'm an actor based in Scotland. I was wondering if anyone knew of any people or companies that deal in fight showreels around the Edinburgh and Glasgow areas. I'm trained in Muay Thai and have been for the last several years, and I wanted to put together a showreel that showcases my skills in a movie/TV style to make it more appealing to casting directors and such. If anyone has any information that would be helpful, please reply to this post or shoot me a dm. Thank you so much for your help and for reading this message!

If anyone has any information that would be helpful, please reply to this post or shoot me a dm. Thank you so much for your help and for reading this message!

sharedPost.text:
Angela Boehm Casting is looking for an ADDITIONAL CHILD ROLE for a Healthcare Commercial that will be filming in the NE Ohio area the week of April 13th, 2026.

*If you’ve already auditioned, no need to resubmit - we already have your audition :)*

*Please see below for more details*

DETAILS:

Project: Healthcare Commercial
Usage: Local/regional healthcare
TV, Social and Web
VIDEO Use ONLY - NO Digital Stills or Print use
Filming Location: NE Ohio Area
Shoot Dates: The week of April 13th
Pay Rate: USAGE Plus 1 Shoot Day (Up to 8 hrs Only)
Child (12 + Under) $1250 + 20% A. Fee
1 year buyout and usage fee renewable

Submission & Selections: Video submission. Headshot & full body photo also needed. We do not need to see photos in advance, just include them with the video.

Submission Deadline: Monday, March 30th at 9:00 AM

Roles & Creative Specs:

Slate instructions: Name, Agent (or phone if you’re not with an agent), Age (for minors), Height, and any conflicts with filming dates (note: it is ideal to have none :)). Please state if you are a real family auditioning (as well as state the family member’s names and the role they are auditioning for). No need to state your location, but please note this is a local hire to NE Ohio.

Audition Directions:
Please do not tape outside
Please have a blank background
Please put slates at the end of the audition.
Please keep all videos between 50-100mb!!!

Son, 2-3 (White) - Should be mimicking that of a sick child. Fever. Coughing, cuddling with the parents for comfort. Clearly not feeling well and looking for support from his parents. We get the feeling that he’s an only child. Please do one take and have the child do the action alone. For a second take you can be in the audition to help your child with the action if you’re willing to be in the commercial with him if chosen. Setting-Suburban, single family home. 

*When auditioning - less is MORE!

All submissions must be emailed to angela@angelaboehmcasting.com with subject line "Healthcare Commercial" by Monday, March 30th at 9:00 AM. Please no YouTube links.  Send submissions via WeTransfer or Dropbox.  

Kind regards,
Angela Boehm Casting Team

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM (*****Me & the Homies*****) – VANCOUVER**

Looking for an actor (Black or Latino, male-presenting, able to play 16–18) for a supporting role in an upcoming independent short film.

**About the Film:**
*Me & the Homies* is a grounded coming-of-age story based on a real night growing up in LA. It follows a group of teenage friends over one night that starts fun and slowly turns darker, exploring loyalty, pressure, and identity.

**Role: “Stats”**
Sharp, observant, and lowkey funny. Stats is always reading the room and calling things out with a dry edge. He feels like one of the guys, but he’s more calculated than he lets on. When things get serious, his instincts kick in, he knows when to push and when to fall back. Strong presence, natural delivery, and subtle performance are key.

**Details:**
* Shoot Dates: April 10, 11 (night shoots)
* Location: Vancouver
* Non-union / Indie / Unpaid (meals + footage provided)

If interested, please send:
* Headshot / recent photo
* Demo reel (if available)
* Age + contact info

Email: mysticstylezfilm@gmail.com

items.text:
Hej!

Chorzów/Zabrze/Katowice/Oświęcim 

Szukamy 2–3 kobiet w wieku 27–30 lat do udziału w materiałach reklamowych dla sklepu z bielizną.

Zależy nam przede wszystkim na naturalnym pokazaniu naszej grupy docelowej – kobiecości, stylu i codziennych sytuacji. Udział nie wymaga pełnego występowania w bieliźnie – stawiamy na subtelność i estetykę.

Idealna szansa na zbudowanie portfolio ze względu na występ popularnych twarzy 

**Oferujemy:**

– udział w projekcie reklamowym - można użyć do swojego portfolio 

– dowolny zestaw bielizny do wyboru

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowana lub chcesz dowiedzieć się więcej – napisz wiadomość prywatną lub zostaw komentarz

topComments.text:
Eliza Gwiazda – aktorka, influencerka i dziennikarka, ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy, mama dzieci w wieku szkolnym.
To wszechstronna osobowość medialna, która z powodzeniem łączy świat show-biznesu z autentyczną komunikacją w mediach społecznościowych. Jako aktorka wyróżnia się naturalnością przed kamerą i umiejętnością wcielania się w różnorodne role – od lekkich, komediowych form po bardziej wyraziste, charakterystyczne kreacje.
Jako influencerka tworzy angażujące i estetyczne treści lifestyle’owe, modowe oraz rodzinne, które trafiają do szerokiego grona odbiorców. Jej profile to przestrzeń inspiracji – od codzienności mamy, przez kulisy eventów i pracy w mediach, aż po rekomendacje sprawdzonych produktów i usług.
Dziennikarskie doświadczenie pozwala jej prowadzić wywiady, relacje z wydarzeń oraz współpracować przy projektach medialnych z profesjonalizmem i swobodą. Świetnie odnajduje się na scenie, przed kamerą oraz w roli prowadzącej eventy.
Jako ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy angażuje się społecznie, promując ideę pomagania i dzielenia się dobrem.
Prywatnie jest mamą dzieci w wieku szkolnym, co nadaje jej komunikacji autentyczności i bliskości – doskonale rozumie potrzeby współczesnych rodzin i potrafi o nich mówić w sposób naturalny, inspirujący i wiarygodny.
Współpracuje z markami w sposób kompleksowy – od tworzenia contentu (reels, posty, stories, TikTok), przez udział w kampaniach, po obecność na eventach i działania wizerunkowe. Jej atutem jest nie tylko zasięg, ale przede wszystkim wiarygodność, osobowość i umiejętność budowania relacji z odbiorcami.Eliza Gwiazda – aktorka, influencerka i dziennikarka, ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy, mama dzieci w wieku szkolnym.
To wszechstronna osobowość medialna, która z powodzeniem łączy świat show-biznesu z autentyczną komunikacją w mediach społecznościowych. Jako aktorka wyróżnia się naturalnością przed kamerą i umiejętnością wcielania się w różnorodne role – od lekkich, komediowych form po bardziej wyraziste, charakterystyczne kreacje.
Jako influencerka tworzy angażujące i estetyczne treści lifestyle’owe, modowe oraz rodzinne, które trafiają do szerokiego grona odbiorców. Jej profile to przestrzeń inspiracji – od codzienności mamy, przez kulisy eventów i pracy w mediach, aż po rekomendacje sprawdzonych produktów i usług.
Dziennikarskie doświadczenie pozwala jej prowadzić wywiady, relacje z wydarzeń oraz współpracować przy projektach medialnych z profesjonalizmem i swobodą. Świetnie odnajduje się na scenie, przed kamerą oraz w roli prowadzącej eventy.
Jako ambasadorka kampanii Krewniacy angażuje się społecznie, promując ideę pomagania i dzielenia się dobrem.
Prywatnie jest mamą dzieci w wieku szkolnym, co nadaje jej komunikacji autentyczności i bliskości – doskonale rozumie potrzeby współczesnych rodzin i potrafi o nich mówić w sposób naturalny, inspirujący i wiarygodny.
Współpracuje z markami w sposób kompleksowy – od tworzenia contentu (reels, posty, stories, TikTok), przez udział w kampaniach, po obecność na eventach i działania wizerunkowe. Jej atutem jest nie tylko zasięg, ale przede wszystkim wiarygodność, osobowość i umiejętność budowania relacji z odbiorcami.

items.text:
ACTORS!

I will review your self tape or showreel within 24 hours and come back to you with in depth notes and directions on how to improve it and make it stand out with casting directors.

ALL BOOKINGS ARE STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL AND ALL MEDIA WILL BE DELETED AFTER THE BOOKING IS OVER.

I have been acting for 31 years, since I was 5, and in that time I have performed in West End, fringe theatre, off west end, tours, cruise ships, blockbuster films, feature films, short films and everything in between.
I have also been a casting director for the last 10 years, and have owned my own theatre and film production company for the last 4 years, so I have been involved in auditions from both sides of the table. I am also a well established writer/director and producer of theatre and film.

Needless to say, I’ve learned a few things.

No one ever teaches you how to properly record/edit a self tape, or what the most effective order all your clips should go in for your showreel, so that’s what I’m doing.

Ive also taken into account that most of us actors can’t afford hundreds of pounds on this services, so my review with two free reviews are only £20.

That’s it.

Book your slot here - https://distortedrebels.com/actor-resources/ols/products/showreelself-tape-review

I look forward to helping you!

Phoenix 🫶🏻

CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS 

22/03/26

CONCRETE FISH

**Logline **A hypnotic experimental short about exploration, vulnerability and community

**Small synopsis **A strange fish girl bursts through the water and stumbles into an alternative rave where she gets a hefty taste of the human experience.

Email: estheralli@outlook.com or mhmollie0303@icloud.com 

* **Shooting 3rd- 7th April E8 2PB**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Graduate film hoping to go to festivals
* Holding online auditions.   
*  **SPHYNX** (Female, 19-24, Any ethnicity) 
   * Fresh out the closet sapphic, in a relationship with Lia. Adjusting to being open with her sexuality, still very insecure and anxious. 
* **KEITH** (19-25, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Regular lad, slightly airheaded, means well and is easy going. Must be open to getting a small flash tattoo on camera. 
* **NAT** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
   * Sleazy, typical “macho man”. Quick to anger, prone to violence.Big ego, little emotional maturity. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 
* **WELLY** (22-26, Male, Any ethnicity)
*  Friends with NAT, slightly less sleazy but still complicit. Must be comfortable with basic fighting choreography and basic dance choreography. 

If you'd like to see some visual concepts from the pitch click this link [https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1v8Zly_Ns4p4-30AqNbSnLaqCBxjuOOs7/edit?usp=sharing&ouid=111701811464739879701&rtpof=true&sd=true)

items.text:
🎬✨ Calling All Movie Lovers & BiG Dreamers ✨🎬

If you love movies… this is for You.

Whether you're into Acting, Storytelling, Filmmaking, or you just LOVE sittin in the Cinema gettin lost in a great film (like The Shawshank Redemption)… you’re invited 🎥🍿

We’ve created DBA aka DREAM BiG ARTiSTs Social Club:
A Fun, Lighthearted Community where we:

🍿 Go to the movies together
🎬 Organize regular cinema nights (twice a month)
🥂 Hang out, relax & connect
🤝 Meet Creatives, Artists & Great People
🍓 Share smoothies, simple foods & good vibes
💡 Enjoy fun, casual talks & ideas (nothing heavy)

No pressure. No cost. No expectations. Come as you are, Being You♥️

Just a space for people who love movies, creativity, and great energy.

So if you’ve ever gone to the cinema alone… or wished you had people to share that experience with…

This is your sign 👇

Join the group & come watch with us 🎥✨

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

[https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/](https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBEwaUlSaWROY0ZBeDIyUTVxa3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5vTBeyeH0HJxJWJFTDJdlmo_R3DTcg-cnl7hhmjDptX4q9GY1AMBXI88V9MA_aem_UGPIP_GOUGnKLa_xKaBQng)

**CASTING CALL** - Australian TV Pilot "Next Big Thing". 

TV SHOW | COLLINGWOOD AREA | PAID

**Casting:**

Mateo - Male 21-26 (Must be able to sing)

Charlie - Male 20-25

**Date TBC:**

Mid-May, 3-4 filming days

**Chemistry read / Rehearsal:** 

Seddon

Next Big Thing is about young artists working to turn their passions into a reality. We follow a friend group of singers, actors and filmmakers as they navigate Melbourne’s Creative to try and become the ‘Next Big Thing’

This show will showcase all different kinds of young creatives, singers, actors, dancers, filmmakers and musicians, with musical performances taking place throughout the show to highlight the incredible young talent that Melbourne has to offer.

**If interested**, please email showreel and headshots to: level1203media@gmail.com

Please include your availability in Mid-May

You can also apply through Starnow using this link:

https://www.starnow.com/casting/pilot-project-next-big-thing-aussie-young-adult-tv-show-3126587/

items.text:
Auditions for Home I'm Darling at Cabrillo Playhouse in San Clemente!
AUDITIONS!!!

Home I’m Darling
By Laura Wade
Directed by Hillary Pearson

Auditions: Sunday March 29th 6pm-10pm and Monday March 30th 6pm-10pm (choose one date)
Callbacks: (if necessary) by invitation Tuesday, March 31st 6pm-10pm
Performances May 22nd -June 14th , Thursdays through Sundays

For auditions, cold reading sides will be available. Please bring a headshot and
resume and be prepared to list any conflicts.
Rehearsals will be held at Cabrillo Playhouse, Mondays through Thursdays 7pm-10pm with some Saturdays. Tech/Dress Rehearsal week rehearsals may be extended.

Synopsis: Home, I’m Darling by Laura Wade is a clever and thought-provoking comedy that explores what happens when nostalgia becomes a way of life. Judy has stepped away from the modern world to embrace the role of the perfect 1950s housewife. However, perfection often comes at a price. Behind the smiles and immaculate surfaces, tensions begin to simmer. Home, I’m Darling is a sharp, stylish comedy with a layered take on nostalgia, feminism, and the complexities of relationships. It explores how we construct and cling to our own versions of reality, and what happens when those carefully built narratives start to unravel.

All Characters use a British accent. Region is flexible by character.
There is a small stipend offered.
We welcome and encourage performers of ALL races, ages, gender identities, abilities, body types and ethnicities to audition.
